newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Sanmina's most recent catalyst was its Q2 FY2026 report (revenue ~$4.0B, EPS $3.16, beat; FY26 revenue guide raised to $13.7-14.3B on ZT Systems integration and AI/cloud infrastructure demand) but that was reported in late April, before the June 9 base case. Q3 (ending June 27) is not yet reported.

sources.label: Sanmina Q2 FY2026 - AI infrastructure surge (Investing.com)
SANM Q2 Deep Dive - ZT Systems & AI demand (StockStory)

verdicts.rankRationale: Cluster-scale AI/cloud integration thesis intact since June 9; no new filing or guidance. The raised FY26 guide and ZT ramp predate the base case and are already in. +3% drift is flow, not new alpha. Q3 print (June 27) is the next event. Hold the rerated benchmark.
verdicts.bull: AI/cloud integration + ZT Systems adds $5-6B annual revenue; FY26 guide raised; IMS margins expanding.
verdicts.neutral: Strong thesis already priced after 57% YTD; Q3 print is the next swing factor.
verdicts.bear: Rerated to ~13.4B cap on macro/rate sensitivity; this page penalizes the crowding premium.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Rate-driven multiple compression / AI capex digestion
